prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业2024年热度分别为推荐和高热推荐，社会需求旺盛；福建省2026年普通高考总人数约26.79万，按近年物理类占比约76%估算，物理类 考生约20.36万人，较2025年增加约1.15万人（+6%），考生规模扩大推高竞争；电子科技大学位于四川成都，非本省高校，但作为电子信息领域顶尖985，跨省 吸引力强；福建省内无同层次电子信息类高校，考生报考意愿稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2159名、2026年缩招4人（-4.1%）、福建省物理类考生增加约6%以及电 子信息类专业持续高热等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧，位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约2136名，区间1816–2456名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 2951 → 2592 → 2190 → 2261 → 2159, showing a fluctuating upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), stabilizing between 2159 and 2261 in the last 3 years, with a baseline of approximately 2159 in 2025. Enrollment plans for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 100 → 102 → 96 → 95 → 98, with a planned 94 in 2026, a decrease of 4 (approximately 4.1%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition due to reduced enrollment.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 33rd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, firmly among the top national science and engineering universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving student hardship identification incidents and associate professor speech incidents), but Douyin popularity ranks 33rd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, overall application attention still at a medium-high level; a dark horse signal appeared in 2022 with a gap, no major admission anomalies in recent years; Electronic Science and Technology, Information and Communication Engineering are A+, Computer Science and Technology is A, Instrument Science and Technology, Optical Engineering, Management Science and Engineering are A-, with outstanding disciplinary strength in the electronic information field, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer and Electronic Information/Communication majors had popularity ratings of recommended and highly recommended in 2024, with strong social demand; the total number of Fujian Province general college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is approximately 267,900, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 203,600 based on a recent Physics Category proportion of about 76%, an increase of about 11,500 (+6%) compared to 2025, expanding the candidate pool and raising competition; University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not a local university, but as a top 985 in the electronic information field, it has strong cross-provincial appeal; there are no similar-level electronic information universities in Fujian Province, so candidate application willingness remains stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2159, a 4-person enrollment reduction in 2026 (-4.1%), an approximately 6% increase in Fujian Physics Category candidates, and the sustained high popularity of electronic information majors, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025, with a minor backward shift in ranking; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2136, with a range of 1816 to 2456.

- Computer Science
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems (National Demonstration Microelectronics College)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)

- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Management and Electronic Engineering Dual Degree Training)
- Low-Altitude Technology and Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1816 to 2456, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as a safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1800), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electronic Information Information and Communication, Computer Science); if the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 2400), choose Tier 3 majors such as Software Engineering and Mathematics as options.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 33rd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with strong comprehensive strength; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is slightly negative, but Douyin popularity is hot (overall ranking 33rd), with overall attention still relatively high; History Category has few majors, and the applicant pool is relatively stable; the university is strong in engineering, and the History Category majors (Social Science Experimental Class, Foreign Language and Literature) have low correlation with the university's core advantageous disciplines, but the 985 platform still has strong appeal to liberal arts candidates.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for the Medicine category (Clinical Medicine) at the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China in Fujian Province over the past four years are: 6289 in 2022, 6757 in 2023, 6263 in 2024, and 6942 in 2025. In terms of enrollment plan, the total number of Medicine category slots from 2022 to 2025 was 5 each year, and the 2026 enrollment plan is also 5 (only for Clinical Medicine), remaining unchanged for five consecutive years. Zero growth in the plan means that the main value of supply-demand elasticity (M3) is consistent with the 2025 ranking, but considering the fluctuation trend of recent years, the 2025 ranking of 6942 is the highest in the past four years, leaving some room for adjustment.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and is selected as a national Double First-Class construction university (Class A). The university is centered on electronic information technology and is known as the vanguard of China's electronic institutions. Although its medical programs are not traditionally strong, relying on the overall 985 platform and the attraction of high-quality students, the Clinical Medicine program still maintains a high admission threshold in Fujian Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China only admits the Clinical Medicine program (five-year, Shahe Campus) in the Medicine category in Fujian Province, with a very small enrollment scale (only 5 slots), making it a scarce admission opportunity. Clinical Medicine itself is a long-term popular program with stable application demand. The university is located in Chengdu, which, although not a first-tier city, is a central city in the southwestern region and still holds some appeal for Fujian candidates. The extremely small enrollment plan leads to significant ranking fluctuations, and the ranking in a single year is easily affected by the application decisions of a few high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the above factors, the predicted minimum admission ranking for the Medicine category (Clinical Medicine) at the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China in Fujian Province in 2026 is 6872, slightly higher than the 2025 ranking (6942) (a smaller ranking number indicates slightly increased competition), with a fluctuation range of 6622 to 7122. The plan remains unchanged, but the 2025 ranking is relatively high, and it is expected to slightly adjust back to around 6872 in 2026.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China only admits one major, Clinical Medicine, in the Medicine category in Fujian Province, with an enrollment plan of 5 slots. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 6622-7122 can attempt to apply, and it is recommended to set this major as a reach goal.
